main.text:
Global networking products and services giant Cisco is set to release their fiscal 2Q17 earnings on February 15th after the closing bell. Wall Street analysts estimate that the firm will post revenues of ~$11.6 billion (with EPS forecast at $0.56). But even if Cisco does meet these revenue expectations, it would still mean a 3.2% year-over-year fall. Looks like the bears will take over the market this time around.

Do you think Cisco stock will plummet after the earnings release?
main.tip: If the forecast EPS of $0.56 is not be exceeded in comparison to last year’s actual of $0.53, traders may expect a sell-off of the Cisco stock.
main.star: *The amount to be credited to the balance in case of successful investment. The offer is valid from 14:40 to 21:00 GMT.
